ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., laminar, turbulent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the researcher who created the simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID linking to the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Reynolds number, Mach number) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boundary_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary condition */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the boundary condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the boundary condition (e.g., inlet velocity, outlet pressure) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the boundary condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the boundary condition value */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the boundary condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boundary_conditions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "numerical_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each numerical method */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the numerical method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the numerical method (e.g., finite volume method, finite element method) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the numerical method */,
  "method_details" TEXT /* Additional details or settings for the numerical method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_numerical_methods_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rms_values" (
  "rms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RMS value */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the RMS value belongs to */,
  "time_iter" INTEGER /* Time iteration of the RMS value */,
  "outer_iter" INTEGER /* Outer iteration of the RMS value */,
  "inner_iter" INTEGER /* Inner iteration of the RMS value */,
  "rms_rho" REAL /* RMS value of density */,
  "rms_rho_u" REAL /* RMS value of x-velocity */,
  "rms_rho_v" REAL /* RMS value of y-velocity */,
  "rms_rho_e" REAL /* RMS value of energy */,
  "rms_rho_w" REAL /* RMS value of z-velocity (for 3D simulations) */,
  "iteration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations about the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rms_values_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* User ID of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
